name: Vera's Squash Pie (1945)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Heavy cream or evaporated milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Add sugar, salt, and spices to the steamed squash and mix thoroughly.
2. Beat eggs, then add cream and mix with the squash.
3. Line a 9-inch pie pan with pastry.
4. Pour in the squash mixture.
5. Bake in a very hot oven (450 degrees Fahrenheit) for 10 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for an additional 40 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
